comment.body:
Can some of you who are experienced in option flows explain this:
- if you look at the weekly es, what I see in terms of tpo (time priced opportunity) is that this market seem to be teleported from 6k-> 6k2
This is very visible in the weekly chart
Then the low of around 6230 is being defended aggressively

Is this defending a result of hard money come in, or it’s just flows?
